name: list_directory
description: Lists the files and subdirectories within a specified directory in the project. Returns an array of names. Use this to explore the project structure or to find specific files/folders.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project.

directory_path.description: The relative path from project_path to the directory to list. Defaults to the project_path itself (current directory '.'). Example: 'src/utils' or '.' for the root.

recursive.description: If true, lists contents recursively including all subdirectories. Defaults to false.

hints.description: This tool is idempotent and non-destructive.
